race.comment: DOLCE D'AMOUR (8) drew the extreme outside last time and had a tough run before finishing fifth. Much better draw this time and expected to go close with a cheaper run. I LOVERAIN (2) was good returning from a spell when finishing third behind Galaxy General. Has a sound second-up record and expected to go close. ROMANTIC LOVE (1) was well off best last time but a bigger winner the start prior. Worth another chance. BIDEN TIME (4) is a former Victorian who was heavily bet first run for the new yard and drew wide. Faded out of it late but fitter for it and can improve sharply. HELLO MARY (10) is another who was poor last time but gets a chance to atone.
